channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: JPMorgan Files to Launch Tokenized Money Market Fund on Ethereum
item.description: Global banking giant JPMorgan filed for a new tokenized money market fund that will initially run on the Ethereum network.

item.title: Bitcoin Wallet Firm Exodus Expands Payments Push, Sells $87 Million in BTC
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin wallet firm Exodus (EXOD) is moving beyond that initial category to focus on the full crypto payments stack.

item.title: JPMorgan files to launch new tokenized fund as Wall Street tokenization race heats up
item.description: The global banking giant is expanding its tokenized money market lineup, following BlackRock's similar move just a few days ago.

item.title: JUST IN: JPMorgan to launch tokenized money-market fund on Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5kOHB1XzVsSWxkTTNYYXRZSXNTWlN2MjR5WWFUVUx1UUEySGhybVZ6NnM3d1ptdkNTMjh5S1dYbU5MNFFYT2haYi0wV1RIVlNLNHFRczZTM3NrbFlZTXlzRXlR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: JPMorgan to launch tokeni…

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve governor, with chair vote expected
item.description: The US Senate voted largely along partisan lines to confirm Kevin Warsh as a member of the Fed's Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.

item.title: Fake OpenAI Repo Hit #1 on Hugging Face—And Stole Passwords While It Trended
item.description: A lookalike repository impersonating OpenAI's Privacy Filter model racked up 244,000 downloads in under 18 hours before Hugging Face pulled it.

item.title: Android Is About to Get a Lot Smarter With Google AI Boosts—Here's How
item.description: Google launched Gemini Intelligence, a feature suite that aims to turn Android devices into proactive AI assistants.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Sells $1.5 Billion in BTC, Reports $1.26 Billion Q1 Loss
item.description: MARA liquidated Bitcoin holdings to fund debt buybacks and acquire a power plant as it joins the industry shift to AI infrastructure.

item.title: Ethereum Developers Propose Fix to 'Blind Signing' Risk Tied to Massive Losses
item.description: Ethereum developers proposed a solution that would end "blind signing," a technical feature that has led to potentially billions in losses.

item.title: DTCC to use Chainlink to power 24/7 collateral management network
item.description: The world’s largest post-trade infrastructure provider will integrate Chainlink technology into its tokenized collateral platform ahead of a Q4 2026 launch.

item.title: WAIB Summit Monaco 2026 returns: the world’s most exclusive gathering for digital assets & AI
item.description: Following the resounding success of its 2025 edition, WAIB Summit Monaco proudly announces its return on June 9–10, 2026, at the prestigious One Monte-Carlo, located in the heart of Monaco’s iconic Casino Square.

item.title: Latest version of crypto market structure bill raises eyebrows ahead of Senate markup
item.description: Some lawmakers continue to push for ethics provision in the bill as bipartisan support is necessary for the CLARITY Act to pass a Senate floor vote.

item.title: Anthropic and OpenAI Warn Buyers: Unauthorized AI Startup Shares May Be Worthless
item.description: Both companies declared SPV-based share schemes invalid this week—and Anthropic named names, including Forge Global.

item.title: XRP traders say bullishness ‘growing’ as ETFs log largest inflow since January
item.description: XRP analysts highlighted the potential for a sustained price rally, fueled by strong institutional demand and a strong technical structure.

item.title: Wall Street's Clearinghouse DTCC Enlists Chainlink for Collateral Management
item.description: DTCC teams with Chainlink to enable round-the-clock collateral movement—a shift that could reshape post-trade finance.

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation unveils new 'Clear Signing' standard to stop users from approving malicious crypto transactions
item.description: The move comes after billions in losses from phishing attacks and wallet drains, with Ethereum pushing to make transaction approvals safer and easier to understand.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to Fed board ahead of expected Chair vote
item.description: Warsh’s confirmation to the Fed board positions the crypto-linked investor to replace Jerome Powell as chair amid inflation and digital asset policy debates.

item.title: OpenAI Faces Lawsuit Over Claims ChatGPT Encouraged Teen's Fatal Overdose
item.description: The family of a deceased 19-year-old college student alleges ChatGPT encouraged dangerous drug use and contributed to his fatal overdose.

item.title: Ethereum derivatives unfazed by DeFi hacks: Can ETH hit $2.6K next?
item.description: ETH futures and options signal quiet confidence among pros despite macro headwinds and DeFi exploits, keeping the $2,600 price target in play.

item.title: What Is Strategy (MSTR)? The Bitcoin Treasury Company
item.description: Software firm Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and its co-founder Michael Saylor have become synonymous with Bitcoin. Here’s what you need to know.

item.title: Stablecoin yield infrastructure project raises $13.5M in round led by Sky Ecosystem
item.description: Osero is coming with three products: Earn, App, and Foundry.

item.title: Privacy emerges as crypto’s next 'killer app,' with Arc, Canton and Tempo topping $1 billion in funding
item.description: New fundraising rounds for three institution-focused blockchains show how regulation, privacy and corporate competition are reshaping crypto infrastructure, according to Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan.

item.title: Franklin Templeton, Kraken Parent Payward Team Up to Tokenize Wall Street Products
item.description: The collaboration between Kraken and Franklin Templeton signals traditional finance's deepening embrace of crypto infrastructure.

item.title: U.S. CFTC in talks with every major pro sports league on policing prediction markets
item.description: Chairman Michael Selig says the agency has already taken several states to court to prove that sports contracts aren't just betting but that they're derivatives.

item.title: Bitcoin’s bull-bear cycle indicator turns green for first time since March 2023
item.description: While some experts point to $90,000 as the next explosive level, others caution that this new "early bull" signal isn't a guaranteed crystal ball.

item.title: Binance's chief marketing officer Rachel Conlan to leave the exchange
item.description: Eowyn Chen, former CEO of Trust Wallet, will serve as her interim replacement.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin climbs back to $80,800 as U.S. stocks bounce into the close
item.description: Inflation rose to a three-year high in April, according to this morning's Consumer Price Index report.

item.title: Bhutan Moves $8.1M in Bitcoin as Sell-Off Continues
item.description: The kingdom of Bhutan has offloaded over $230 million in Bitcoin this year while steadily reducing its holdings, according to Arkham data.

item.title: EBay Rejects GameStop's $55 Billion Offer as 'Neither Credible Nor Attractive'
item.description: Publicly traded online marketplace eBay slammed GameStop's unsolicited $55.5 billion acquisition offer as insufficient.

item.title: Bitcoin digests highest US CPI since 2023 as Fed rate hike woes return
item.description: Bitcoin showed fresh signs of volatility as US CPI inflation saw new multiyear highs on oil price hikes thanks to the US-Iran war.

item.title: LMAX Group launches digital asset collateral solution for institutions
item.description: The new portal lets LMAX clients deposit digital assets into custody and use them as collateral to trade FX, metals, CFDs, perpetual futures and crypto.

item.title: Spot XRP ETFs attract biggest inflows since January
item.description: The five U.S.-listed spot XRP funds pulled in $25.8 million on Monday, the largest single-day net inflow since Jan. 5, even as ether spot ETFs shed nearly $17 million.

item.title: Exodus sells over 1,000 Bitcoin as Q1 loss widens to $32M
item.description: Exodus Movement reported a $32.1 million net loss in Q1, with revenue down 36.8% to $22.7 million amid a drop in monthly active users.

item.title: FalconX expands tokenized credit facility to Monad network in lending push
item.description: FalconX’s tokenized credit vaults can now be used as collateral in DeFi markets on Monad, expanding institutional lending products across blockchain networks.

item.title: North Korea ‘industrialized’ crypto theft, laundered billions: CertiK
item.description: North Korea-linked hackers stole about $2.06 billion of the $3.4 billion lost in crypto hacks in 2025 and are moving from phishing to physical infiltration, CertiK’s new report finds.

item.title: Bitcoin whale 'still short' BTC despite facing $13M in losses
item.description: A growing cluster of bearish indicators points to a possible Bitcoin pullback toward $71,000, potentially easing the whale’s $13 million net losses.

item.title: Bitcoin may avoid historic bear market losses as ETF flows grow, says analyst
item.description: The current Bitcoin bear market drawdown is far smaller than previous bear markets, as steady ETF inflows and corporate Bitcoin buying continue to absorb selling pressure.

item.title: France’s central banker Beau clashes with Lagarde over private digital euro plans
item.description: France’s central bank deputy governor told CoinDesk public and private European entities need to get involved in digital asset development, diverging sharply from Christine Lagarde’s stance.

item.title: Roaring Kitty-linked RKC memecoin crashes as developer cashes out $729K
item.description: A Solana memecoin linked to Roaring Kitty’s X account crashed after its developer cashed out $729,000, raising hack and sniping concerns.

item.title: EBay rejects GameStop’s $56 billion bid, putting bitcoin exposure back in focus
item.description: The online marketplace's board called the half-cash, half-stock offer "neither credible nor attractive" Tuesday.

item.title: Four signs that Bitcoin has recovered to ‘full’ bullish momentum
item.description: Expanding Bitcoin price momentum, recovering liquidity and surging network activity all point to continued bullish control.

item.title: Kraken parent, Franklin Templeton to develop onchain investment products
item.description: The partnership will focus on tokenized yield products, blockchain-based funds and institutional crypto markets.

item.title: Elliptic raises $120 million backed by Nasdaq, Deutsche Bank as AI reshapes crypto security
item.description: The crypto analytics firm plans to expand its AI-powered monitoring tools as stablecoins and tokenized finance grow rapidly, CEO Simone Maini said.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 4.9%, as index trades lower
item.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 4.4% from Monday, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.

item.title: North Korean Crypto Hackers Stole $2.1B in 2025, 60% of All Losses: CertiK
item.description: New analysis reveals state-sponsored groups now dominate crypto crime, laundering billions through sophisticated cross-chain networks.

item.title: Istanbul Blockchain Week returns in June 2026 amid surging crypto adoption in Türkiye
item.description: Istanbul Blockchain Week, organized by Web3 marketing agency EAK Digital is set to return for its fifth edition on June 2nd-3rd, 2026, at the Hilton Bomonti Hotel.

item.title: Hot inflation data pours cold water on Federal Reserve rate cut hopes
item.description: Bitcoin was trading at $80,814 following the news, down 1.2% over the past 24 hours.

item.title: CleanSpark stock slides 9% as quarterly earnings miss estimates on bitcoin holdings loss
item.description: CleanSpark reported a net loss of $378.3 million for the quarter ending on March 31, a steep increase from the $138.8 million loss reported the same period last year.

item.title: [Arkham Intel] Notice of Chain Removal: TON Arkham periodically evaluates chain integrations for continued maintenance based on user demand and their importance to the crypto ecosystem, among other factors. Based on a recent review from our team, we - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9sM1ZLUkZJLU5IaG1FeXczV3JhSEFCbkxLZkR0a1NwWFNxZHZRLTZsbWhCc0pkelE3N3JmUmotZXExMDlqTnpzM2l2X2dvYWJwa1M4WW1lWDhIUUU?oc=5" target="_blank">[Arkham Intel] Notice of Chain Removal: TON…

item.title: DTCC builds out blockchain-based collateral system with Chainlink integration
item.description: The platform tokenizes collateral on blockchain rails and uses smart contracts to enable 24/7 automated collateral management across financial markets.

item.title: Bitcoin is the most sovereign money ever created. It is also the least private money people have ever used. strkBTC fixes that. Live on Starknet today. 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1pSk04Tl9iRTRhc2dFNmtFN21oMHRYaHo1d3hQbkd4VHF0cDgydF9aeEhCMGtsNzE2YlUzUUVRRnIxLVlya0V6akRKclpRUWcweUJYQXBUdkp5bHJPM1E?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is the most sovereign money eve…

item.title: Morning Minute: Circle Stock Soars After Q1 Beat, $222M Arc Raise
item.description: Circle just beat earnings and raised fresh capital for its new Arc blockchain, while Michael Saylor explained how and why he'd sell Bitcoin.

item.title: Senate Banking Panel Releases CLARITY Act Draft Ahead of Thursday Markup
item.description: The draft text contained provisions that could permanently exempt Bitcoin and Ethereum from securities law.

item.title: Wells Fargo lifts Ether ETF holdings in Q1 as Bitcoin positions shift
item.description: Wells Fargo lifted Ether ETF exposure while rotating Bitcoin holdings and sharply increasing its Strategy stake, per its Q1 2026 13F filings.

item.title: Exodus dumps 1,000 bitcoin: Why the crypto wallet is cashing out to fund a payments empire
item.description: Exodus sold $73.2M in crypto, causing cash, cash equivalents, and stablecoins to jump from $5.2M to $74.4M by the end of Q1 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin will 'explode' past $90,000 and hit $126,000, Arthur Hayes says
item.description: Arthur Hayes, the BitMEX co-founder who now runs Maelstrom, said bitcoin's return to its October high is a "foregone conclusion," and he is taking his fund to maximum risk, with HYPE, ZEC, and NEAR as his top altcoin picks.

item.title: Is This Bitcoin Bear Market Different? Analysts Weigh In
item.description: Bitcoin is down 35% from its all-time high, making this drawdown shallower than past cycles, but analysts warn the bear market could resume.

item.title: Bakkt pivots into stablecoin infrastructure as revenue tumbles 77% in Q1
item.description: Bakkt posted a net loss of $0.41 per share in Q1 as revenue fell 77% to $243.6 million on lower crypto trading volumes.

item.title: Bhutan’s GMC offers quick licenses, bank accounts to lure crypto firms
item.description: Gelephu Mindfulness City in Bhutan is offering a faster licensing track with banking and zero‑tax incentives to attract regulated crypto firms willing to build long‑term operations.
